name: Whisper
who:
Halfling infiltrator of the Thieves Guild
Rarely speaks, lets her daggers do the talking
Master of poisons and stealth
Potential companion upon completing guild questline
Fiercely loyal to those who earn her trust
what:
Guild's top infiltration specialist
Poison crafting expert
Offers training in stealth techniques
Potential companion if chosen over Red Mara
where:
Dalhurst - Thieves Guild hideout
Available as companion after questline completion
quests: Thieves Guild Shadow Master reward choice

sprite.notes: Small halfling in dark clothing, dual daggers visible

dialogue.notes: Speaks rarely and briefly, communicates through gestures

combat.notes: Fast attacker - low HP, rapid strikes, poison damage

follower.notes: Quick flanking attacks, poison DOT, excellent at escaping
